title: DDS COVID Telework Start Evidence (March 2020)
description: Computed evidence packet tracing when Massachusetts DDS likely began work-from-home/telework during the COVID-19 pandemic. Synthesizes SSA's March 2020 public-office closure, SSA testimony that state DDS VPN work-from-home access was established within ten days, SSA OIG's pandemic DDS processing report, and MRC SRC minutes referencing COVID-19 telework assignments and a Remote Access Survey. Concludes that the public record supports a DDS-specific March 17-27, 2020 start window while the exact Massachusetts DDS directive remains a MassAbility PRR target.
geographic_coverage: Massachusetts DDS focus; SSA national/DDS context; MRC/MassAbility context

source.publisher: U.S. Social Security Administration and SSA Office of the Inspector General
source.title: DDS COVID telework start source chain

update_cadence: As needed; revise if MassAbility PRR returns a precise Massachusetts DDS telework directive or start date.
notes: Computed because this packet synthesizes multiple official sources and separates public evidence from inference. It does not claim a single public Massachusetts DDS directive date; the exact date remains a MassAbility records-request target.
